nasb.text: When it was evening, there came a rich man from Arimathea, named Joseph, who himself had also become a disciple of Jesus.

esv.text: When it was evening, there came a rich man from Arimathea, named Joseph, who also was a disciple of Jesus.

cnv.text: 到了晚上，有一個亞利馬太的富翁來到，他名叫約瑟，是耶穌的門徒。

ccb.text: 傍晚，从亚利马太来了一位名叫约瑟的富人，他是耶稣的门徒。

csbs.text: 到了傍晚，来了一个亚利马太的财主，名叫约瑟，他自己也是耶稣的门徒。
